title: Incident Response Policy
text: Sev1 incidents must be escalated to the on-call incident commander within 15 minutes. A public incident channel must be opened immediately.

title: Access Control Policy
text: Production data access requires approval from the data platform team and a valid business justification.

title: Model Deployment Checklist
text: Models must pass offline evaluation, safety checks, and rollback testing before deployment.

title: Evaluation Ownership
text: The Model Evaluation team owns benchmark design and recurring test runs.

title: On-Call Responsibilities
text: The incident commander coordinates response and assigns actions during incidents.

title: Customer Communication
text: Customers must be updated within 30 minutes for Sev1 incidents and regularly thereafter.

title: Assistant Behaviour
text: The assistant must only answer from provided documents and must abstain if unsure.

title: Data Retention
text: User data must be deleted after 90 days unless required for compliance.

title: Logging Policy
text: All production systems must log requests and errors for monitoring and debugging.

title: Security Review
text: All new features must undergo a security review before release.

title: Deployment Ownership
text: Every deployment must have a clearly defined owner responsible for rollback decisions.

title: Experimentation Policy
text: A/B tests must define success metrics before launch.

title: Latency Targets
text: User-facing systems must respond within 300ms at p95 latency.

title: Model Monitoring
text: Models must be monitored for drift and performance degradation post-deployment.

title: Incident Severity Definitions
text: Sev1 means total system outage. Sev2 means partial degradation.

title: Access Reviews
text: Access permissions must be reviewed every 30 days.

title: Backup Policy
text: Critical data must be backed up daily and stored in a separate region.

title: Feature Rollout
text: New features should be rolled out gradually using feature flags.

title: Compliance Requirements
text: Systems handling user data must comply with GDPR and related regulations.

title: Error Handling
text: All systems must gracefully handle errors and provide meaningful messages.
